title: Embed for ephemeral form vs persisted data
prompt: An HTTP API wants to validate a SearchParams struct (query string + filters + sort) before running a query. This data is NEVER persisted. Use `embedded_schema` (not `schema`) so no DB table is created. Module: MyApp.Search.SearchParams with fields :query (string), :filter (string), :sort (string). Write to lib/my_app/search/search_params.ex.
tier_rationale: Requires choosing embedded_schema over schema for non-persisted data. Sonnet often creates a backing table.
research_citation: georgeguimaraes plugin: 'Standard schema/2 for database tables; embedded_schema/1 for form validation only.'
